dungeon: Asgard (Odin Throne Room + Hela) + Galactic farming
map: DOCUMENTED: Asgard grey-stone halls leading to ODIN'S THRONE ROOM (final arena). Also Lost-Halls-style grey dungeons, a concentric-square temple, green realm, and dark void/galactic zones.

bosses.name: Odin (Asgard final boss — Throne Room)
attacks: summons Asgard Guardians ('Help me, guards. Kill the mortals!')
taunts: You cannot win against my gods!
You have no chance in this fight!
Attention to all guards, intruders in the Throne Room.
Help me, guards. Kill the mortals!
You have come a long way. It will end soon!

bosses.name: Hela (Asgard)
taunts: Powered by thousands of souls, instant death.
You have come a long way, just to die!

mechanics: DOCUMENTED Asgard detail: ODIN is the final boss in a THRONE ROOM and summons 'guards' (Asgard Guardians) — 'Attention to all guards, intruders in the Throne Room.' / 'Help me, guards. Kill the mortals!'. New Odin taunts + Hela's fuller 'Powered by thousands of souls, instant death.' and 'You have come a long way, just to die!' (mirrors Odin's 'You have come a long way. It will end soon!'). Concurrent GALACTIC farming: /25 counter ('Hermit God defeated 16/25'), Lucky Ent God / Pulse / Lord of the Lost Lands spawns; Death Notifier 'crushed by Hela'. Announcer personas: Imp, Dragon, Beholder, Snake.
uncertain: Some taunt endings clipped. Odin's exact attack patterns not isolated. Throne Room layout not mapped.
confidence: HIGH for Odin + Hela taunts (verbatim) + the Asgard Throne-Room/guards structure (DOCUMENTED); galactic /25 reconfirmed.
